query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white profile photograph of a smooth, sculptural figure wearing a wide-brimmed hat against a solid black background. Thin lines of light trace the upward-curving brim, the forehead, nose, lips, and shoulder, while the rest of the form recedes into darkness. The subject faces right, presenting a stark, high-contrast contour with minimal visible surface detail.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white profile photograph of a smooth, sculptural figure wearing a wide-brimmed hat against a solid black background, dominated by extreme underexposure that crushes shadows into total darkness. Thin lines of light trace only the upward-curving brim, forehead, nose, lips, and shoulder, while the deliberate exposure extreme eliminates surface texture and facial features, reducing the subject to a near-abstract rim-lit silhouette.
